title: Test Episode — The Velatium Pipeline Test
quick_answer: This is a 40-60 word test answer for the AEO block. It directly answers the central question of the episode and is written for AI extraction. The pipeline is being tested end to end to confirm all commits land correctly.
article_body:
This is the test article body. It confirms the full Velatium publishing pipeline is working correctly from Google Drive trigger through GitHub commits to live episode page.

Does the Pipeline Work?

If you are reading this at thevelatium.com/episodes/test-episode then yes it does. The workflow detected the file, extracted metadata, committed to GitHub, sent the newsletter, and moved the files to 03_Published.
